package rulecoverage

func PositiveSameStructUsedForBindPersistAndRespond() string {
    ruleID := "same_struct_used_for_bind_persist_and_respond"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "A single struct type reused for request binding, database persistence, and API response serialization."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
